<think> The Tower of Terror is a drop ride located at Disney's Hollywood Studios in Florida, and it's known for its 13-story free-fall drop. In fact, the title of the fastest roller coaster in the world is typically associated with high-speed roller coasters like Kingda Ka at Six Flags Great Adventure or Formula Rossa at Ferrari World. I'm going to assume that the Tower of Terror was never the fastest roller coaster in the world, so it didn't lose its status as such. Therefore, the answer is likely "never".</think>
<answer> never </answer>
